title: rubus hirsutus f. xanthocarpus
intro: Rubus hirsutus f. xanthocarpus, also known as the golden-fruited bramble, is a variant of the Rubus hirsutus species, which is a type of bramble plant native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirsutus f. xanthocarpus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus hirsutus f. xanthocarpus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
